description:
Operating Area:
Summer 2026: Corsica

YLIME is the epitome of luxury and elegance, a Sunreef 60 that exudes character and style. Available for charter, this stunning catamaran boasts a clever layout, offering plenty of space to unwind or gather with friends and family. Inside, refined textures and subtle marble accents create a serene atmosphere, perfect for relaxation.

The yacht features four luxurious en-suite cabins, accommodating up to 8 guests. The spacious master suite on the port side offers generous dressing space and a large bathroom. To starboard, three comfortable guest cabins with queen-sized beds provide a restful retreat. The open-plan main deck includes a galley-up layout with a dining area, fostering a homely and welcoming ambiance.

YLIME’s expansive exterior spaces include ample sunpads on both the front terrace and flybridge, providing endless opportunities to soak up the sun. The aft deck features a cozy alfresco dining area, and the hydraulic swimming platform offers easy access to the water. Equipped with state-of-the-art water sports gear and staffed by a professional crew of three, YLIME is sure to exceed every expectation, ensuring an unforgettable charter experience.

crew.name: Clement Dubas
crew.bio:
French

Originally from Le Grau du Roi in southern France, Clément has over five years of experience as a professional Captain and nearly a decade at sea. He has cruised extensively throughout La Réunion, Corsica, Sardinia, and the Caribbean, commanding both motor and sailing yachts with confidence and care.

Calm, proactive, and genuinely passionate about life on the water, Clément is known for his team spirit and ability to create a smooth, enjoyable atmosphere on board—qualities that make every charter a memorable experience.

crew.name: Christophe Bouchaux
crew.bio:
French
Hailing from Nice, Christophe brings over 15 years of experience as a yacht Chef and crew member, having worked aboard both motor and sailing yachts across the Mediterranean. His cuisine is rooted in French and Mediterranean traditions—fresh, elegant, and always tailored to the preferences of guests.

With a calm and professional demeanor, Christophe is as comfortable in the galley as he is provisioning in the bustling markets of Saint-Tropez or navigating the logistics of busy charters. His strong sense of organization, attention to detail, and passion for well-crafted meals, ensuring every dining experience on board is both refined and memorable.

crew.name: Swana Lancien
crew.bio:
French

Born in Madagascar and raised on the islands of Nosy Be and La Réunion, Swana naturally gravitated toward a life at sea. With experience on a range of catamarans throughout the Caribbean and Mediterranean, she brings grace, adaptability, and a warm, welcoming presence to her role as Stewardess.

Swana is highly organized, attentive to detail, and genuinely dedicated to guest comfort, ensuring every moment on board feels relaxed and refined. Her background in architecture adds a creative touch to interior presentation, and her positive energy makes her a joy to have on any crew.
